name: hirey
description: Hirey's official Claude Code marketplace — plugins for the Hi people-to-people platform.

plugins.name: hirey-hi
plugins.description: Find people for hiring, jobs, housing, dating, friendship, founders, investors, lawyers, and any other human-lead work — pure-skill plugin: zero local install, zero browser OAuth, zero user clicks. Claude bootstraps an anonymous Hi identity on first use and calls Hi's REST API directly.
